title: Twelve Secures $83 million in Additional Series C & Project Funding
content: Following the momentum of $645 million funding announcement last fall, twelve secured additional strategic investments in our Series C and project funding for its AirPlantâ„¢ One facility, totaling $83 million and bringing it even closer to its mission to transform CO2 into the building blocks of a fossil-free future. The existing investors DCVC increased their Series C position in this latest tranche, and Fundamental Advisors upsized their construction loan to the AirPlant One installation.
author: Analysts Account
